whatibuild.label: Capabilities
whatibuild.title: What We Do
whatibuild.description: Tools and systems that help people work with more clarity, fewer mistakes, and less manual effort.
whatibuild.card1.title: Decision tools
whatibuild.card1.description: Tools that help people make clearer, more consistent decisions in everyday work.
whatibuild.card2.title: Process automation
whatibuild.card2.description: We automate repetitive tasks so teams spend less time on manual work and admin.
whatibuild.card3.title: Digital health tools
whatibuild.card3.description: Tools for clinical decision support, treatment tracking, and more organized day-to-day work in clinical practice.
how.title: How We Think
how.p1: Most operational problems do not happen because people are lazy or incapable.
how.p2: They happen because information is scattered, processes are inconsistent, and too much work depends on improvisation.
how.p3: That is why Metaxis builds tools and systems that help teams work with more clarity, less manual work, and less operational chaos.
how.p4: We do not build technology for the sake of technology.
how.p5: We build things that have to work in real environments, day after day.
projects.label: Work
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Tools for real work in clinical, research, and educational settings.
projects.page.label: Portfolio
projects.page.description: Tools and systems in active clinical, research, and educational use — decision support, interactive congress tools, and long-term treatment tracking.
labs.label: Experiments

labs.page.description: Experimental AI projects — prototypes, proofs-of-concept, and novel ideas being explored in the open.
labs.note: Lab projects are experimental by nature — expect rough edges, breaking changes, and incomplete documentation.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.p1: Metaxis usually works on problems involving too much manual work, disconnected information, or processes that depend on improvisation.
contact.p2: If you think we can help simplify, structure, or automate something — reach out.
contact.page.description: We work with teams on concrete operational problems — automating manual work, connecting scattered information, decision-support tools.
contact.response: Typically respond within 48 hours. For urgent inquiries, LinkedIn is faster.
